info: After hitting a target (LHT: 5, MED: 4, HVY: 3) times they explode, applying Flames of Life and Temporary Health to them and other nearby targets. The damage of explosion and amount of Temporary Health given are randomized. Damage: 5.5-33 typeless damage. This cannot be buffed, and the explosions cannot execute. Temporary Health: 0-50. The explosion has 7.56x PvE scaling, the green fire has 6.66x PvE scaling; multiply PvP damage dealt by this amount to get PvE damage. Temporary Health given does not scale in PvE.
name: Curse of Ysley's Ember
in_game_desc: Once enough stacks have been applied, the Fire of Life geminates. The explosion deals a random amount of damage and grants temporary health to the affected targets.
